title: 1. Introduction > 1.1 Scope
text_content: This DHFI lists all required project documentation for the released version of the devices indicated on the front page of this document. The documentation is referenced with the title, identification number, revision number (if a document has multiple revisions) and the location where it is physically or electronically stored. The HAL 4.0 DHF is located in the document control system nucleus (Nucleus>Business Workgroups>DHF>Delivery Systems>Halcyon>4.0) HAL 4.0 Design History File Index This document contains confidential, proprietary information of Varian Medical Systems.
